title: Altar SMP S2 Texture Pack
description: Adds the textures for the Legendary weapons from Altar SMP S2
body:
Credits to Quacker for making these tuff models

Adds cool weapons:
- Omen Spear
- Dragonrend
- Wither Symbiote
- Ancient Blade
- Tidebreaker
- And More weapons coming soon

If you want to put the pack on your server use this plugin:
https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/resource-pack-manager.118574/
